task_completion.visual_evidence: Vital Recorder application window is visible with '0003.vital' loaded (visible in the title bar, file list, or track headers).

task_completion.description: Configure display to show ONLY HR, MBP, SPO2, and CO2/ETCO2
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main graph area shows ONLY tracks labeled HR, MBP (or ART_MBP), SPO2, and CO2 (or ETCO2). Unwanted tracks like ECG, PLETH, or AWP must be removed or hidden.

task_completion.description: Adjust the view to encompass the entire recording duration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The time axis (x-axis) of the graphs is zoomed out to span the entire duration of the recording, showing the full trend from start to finish within the visible window.

task_completion.description: Initiate PDF export to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As', 'Print', or 'Export' dialog is visible, showing the file name 'case3_summary.pdf' and the target directory 'Documents' (C:\Users\Docker\Documents).

task_completion.description: Verify the PDF file is created at the expected path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window shows 'case3_summary.pdf' in the 'Documents' folder, or a PDF viewer is open showing the exported summary with the 4 vital sign trends.

integrity.description: Agent used the Vital Recorder GUI to configure and export
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Vital Recorder application menus, track settings, and export dialogs, rather than a terminal or Python script.

integrity.description: The PDF was exported from the application natively
integrity.visual_evidence: The export process is visible through the application's native print/export dialogs, ensuring the file wasn't created manually or copied from elsewhere.

integrity.description: The exported file is a genuine PDF containing the graphs
integrity.visual_evidence: The file size and icon in the file explorer indicate a real PDF file. If opened, it contains the graphical trends from Vital Recorder, not plain text or a blank page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case file: 0003.vital. Required tracks to keep: HR, SPO2, MBP (or ART_MBP), CO2 (or ETCO2). Tracks to exclude: ECG, PLETH, AWP, and any other waveform data. Expected output path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\case3_summary.pdf.
